steps.title: Convert calendar dates to x-values
steps.content: January 13 is 2 days after January 11, so $x = 2$. January 15 is 4 days after January 11, so $x = 4$. We need the flight times at these two x-values.

steps.title: Read scatterplot points and calculate slope
steps.content:
From the scatterplot: at $x = 2$, the bird flew for $y = 6$ hours; at $x = 4$, the bird flew for $y = 15$ hours.

Average rate of change is the slope between these two points: $$\text{Average rate of change} = \frac{y_2 - y_1}{x_2 - x_1} = \frac{15 - 6}{4 - 2} = \frac{9}{2} = 4.5$$ The answer is 4.5 hours per day.
